title: Blind's Music Discs
description: Additional music discs to find out in the world as well as a new type of jukebox to use them on.
body:
## Blind's Music Discs

This mod adds 10 new music discs containing music from the Minecraft soundtrack by C418.\
Additionally this mod adds a new type of jukebox, the small jukebox, perfect for desks or compact spaces.

**Please remember to install the resource pack so that the discs function.**\
**The songs are included as a seperate pack to follow C418's copyright policy.**

## Music Discs

This mod adds ten new music discs to find out in the world.\
These discs require the resource pack found in the dependencies to play their music.\
This is to comply with C418's policy for using his music.

Found in same places as Otherside
- C418 - Sweden

Found in same places as Cat and 13
- C418 - Dog

Found in the new composer's house structure.
- C418 - Door
- C418 - Death
- C418 - Wet Hands
- C418 - Chris
- C418 - Droopy Likes Your Face
- C418 - Flake
- C418 - Kyoto
- C418 - Intro

## The Composer's House

The composer's house is a structure found randomly in forest biomes.\
It's built as a small structure to teach the player some basic properties of noteblocks as well as containing one of the new small jukeboxes found in this mod.

## Small Jukeboxes

The small jukeboxes are functionally identical to the normal jukeboxes, however, they have a different model and come in all wood types.\
The crafting recipe is shown below.

## Advancements

This mod also comes with it's own set of advancements, relating to both vanilla discs and the new modded discs.

## Additional notes

C418's policy for using his music can be found here:\
https://c418.org/2017/01/26/what-am-i-allowed-to-do-with-daniels-music/
